expectations.text: Output contains '## PR Review' header, '**Target:**' metadata line, and a verdict section (Approved/Request Changes/etc.)
expectations.evidence: Line 1: '## PR Review', Line 3: '**Target:** `origin/v18/dev`', Line 27: '## Approved with Suggestions for improvement'

expectations.text: Review references 'v18/dev' as the target branch (not 'main')
Review discusses the behavioral impact of changing the default webhook payload type from the current default to 'Minimal'
expectations.evidence: Line 5 states: 'Changes the default webhook payload type from Legacy to Minimal'. Lines 7-8 discuss affected implementations and how WebhookSettings, UmbracoBuilder, and extension methods will pick up the new default. Also notes the ~30 sub-builder extension methods that still have Legacy as parameter default.

expectations.text: Review output is under 150 lines — proportionate to the tiny 3-file, 25-line change
expectations.evidence: Review is 29 lines, well under the 150-line threshold.
